tasks.name: ops:rollup
tasks.description: Rebuild ROLLUP.md from collected thread notes + research digests.

tasks.name: ops:collect
tasks.description: Sweep ./docs/thread/*.md and normalize into ./build/thread.json.

tasks.name: agent:use:grok-fast
tasks.command: node -e "console.log('Switch provider/model in Cursor UI → Cline to grok-code-fast-1')"
tasks.description: Helper reminder to set Grok Code Fast in Cline.

tasks.name: agent:bulk-sweep
tasks.description: Batch file transforms with retry + tests.

tasks.name: agent:validate
tasks.description: Run linters/tests and print a compact summary.

tasks.name: cursor:install-exts:win
tasks.description: Install recommended Cursor extensions (Windows).

tasks.name: cursor:install-exts:posix
tasks.description: Install recommended Cursor extensions (POSIX).

tasks.name: cursor:scrub-exts:win
tasks.description: Remove all non-desired Cursor/VS Code extensions (Windows).

tasks.name: cursor:scrub-exts:posix
tasks.description: Remove all non-desired Cursor/VS Code extensions (POSIX).

tasks.name: ops:check-github
tasks.description: Confirm GitHub visibility/auth on this machine.

tasks.name: slurm:audit:win
tasks.description: Run slurm GitHub scan (Windows).

tasks.name: slurm:audit:posix
tasks.description: Run slurm GitHub scan (POSIX).

tasks.name: slurm:compare
tasks.description: Compare two slurm scan folders (example).

tasks.name: ops:baseline
tasks.description: Capture baseline for Cursor/ChatGPT/Node CPU% and RAM.

tasks.name: ops:snapshot
tasks.description: Take a snapshot and write a markdown report.

tasks.name: ops:nightly
tasks.description: Snapshot + drift detect; exit code signals issues.

tasks.name: ops:export-telemetry-csv
tasks.description: Export ops/.telemetry/*.md to Grafana-friendly CSV.

tasks.name: agent:abstraction-sampler
tasks.description: Generate/rank abstractions, sample solutions under fixed budget.

tasks.name: agent:providers:print
tasks.description: Show current GPT/Claude balancing and backoff.

tasks.name: ops:commit-all
tasks.description: Commit all pending changes and push if possible.

tasks.name: ultra:release
tasks.description: Bump version, tag, push, wait for GH release assets, print URL.
